workspaceDescription: A monorepo-ready workspace shell with Effect and i18n hooks.
workspaceStatusNote: Paraglide is now driving localized copy in locale-prefixed routes.
landingUiHeroFlowTitle: From checkout to code entry in minutes
landingUiHeroFlowLead: The self-service journey keeps the day moving without waiting for staff or handoffs.
landingUiHeroFlowStepOneText: Pick a day pass, workstation, or private office setup that matches the day ahead.
landingUiHeroFlowStepTwoText: Every booking turns into a unique code so entry stays fast, flexible, and contactless.
landingUiHeroFlowStepThreeText: Arrive in Palmovka, unlock the door, and shift from setup mode to work in minutes.
landingMetadataTitle: Deskohub Workspace | Self-service coworking, events, teambuildings, and private rooms in Palmovka
landingMetadataDescription: Book Deskohub Workspace for coworking, company events, board-game teambuildings, private offices, or TTRPG sessions in Palmovka with 24/7 code access.
landingHeroTitle: The first self-service workspace on Palmovka.
landingHeroSubtitle: Pro gear, total calm, code entry, open 24/7.
landingRozcestnikDescription: Workspace = focus + events + private game sessions. One address, two rhythms of your day.
landingRozcestnikBarText: Party energy, drinks, noise, and an open community where players, creators, and curious newcomers connect.
landingRozcestnikWorkspaceTitle: Workspace - Where people create and prevail
landingRozcestnikWorkspaceText: Coworking, pro events, and private adventures in a calm space that keeps pace with your output.
landingTeambuildingsTitle: A team day that blends strategy, play, and frictionless hosting
landingTeambuildingsText: For companies, agencies, and smaller teams, we prepare board-game teambuildings that connect facilitated programming, flexible workspace hosting, and a natural link to the wider Deskohub Universum.
landingTeambuildingsFeatureOneText: We shape the flow around your group size, the goal of the day, and the level of facilitation you want - from a lighter social evening to a guided team program.
landingTeambuildingsFeatureTwoText: The space handles briefing, workshop time, and the game block without the friction of moving the team between venues.
landingTeambuildingsFeatureThreeText: We handle the atmosphere, technical setup, and self-service catering so your team can stay focused on the shared experience.
landingTeambuildingsSideTitle: From a compact internal meetup to an evening the whole team remembers
landingTeambuildingsSideText: We can prepare the teambuilding as a standalone experience or as an extension of a workshop or company event. The final setup is always tailored to the brief.
landingTeambuildingsCapacityText: Group size, game curation, and supporting services are planned individually so the program fits your team and the rhythm of the event.
landingTeambuildingsInquiryPrompt: Send us a brief and we will propose the right teambuilding setup.
landingTtrpgText: Forget squeezing a session into a living room full of interruptions. Book our sound-insulated meeting room with smart lighting and a self-service bar just behind the door.
landingTtrpgFeatureOneText: Set the scene to match the location and mood of the campaign - from deep forests to lava fields.
landingTtrpgFeatureTwoText: The room keeps the focus inside while the rest of the workspace stays behind the door.
landingTtrpgFeatureThreeText: Drinks and snacks stay within reach without waiting for staff or breaking the flow of play.
landingTtrpgDetail: A room tuned for roleplay, focus, smart light cues, and long evening campaigns.
landingTtrpgBackgroundAlt: Deskohub Workspace TTRPG room prepared for an evening session
landingEventsText: Need a workshop, team day, or community meetup for 30-60 people? Our multifunctional Palmovka space adapts to your format.
landingEventsFeatureOne: Flexible layout: rolling furniture and a conversion from cowork to lecture setup in 10 minutes
landingEventsFeatureTwo: Technical setup: projection, sound, microphones, and high-speed internet
landingEventsFeatureThree: Catering: self-service bar with signature sandwiches and unlimited coffee
landingEventsFoodCallout: No waiting for staff. Food is ready in our smart fridge: signature sourdough sandwiches from CZK 125 / 2 pcs, quiche CZK 95, jar salad CZK 145.
landingEventsFullSpaceRentalDetail: Capacity for 30-60 people and the final service scope depend on the event type. We can share an orientational hourly frame in the tailored offer.
landingCoworkTitle: Coworking and workspace support for everyday progress
landingCoworkOfficeText: Your own Palmovka base. Small team, big progress. Private office, 24/7 access, and full Deskohub infrastructure included.
landingCoworkWorkstationText: Sit down at a workstation with dual 27" monitors and stable support for focused work, visual production, and ready-to-go setup days.
landingCoworkComingSoonText: Cowork day passes and enhanced workstation setups are launching soon. Monthly office and private office options remain available.
landingPricingSubtitle: Choose your day mode. Every pass includes self-service access and a calm production environment.
landingPricingComingSoonNote: This cowork offer is marked as coming soon and is not bookable yet.
landingPricingItemOneText: Open-space desk, high-speed Wi-Fi, and post-mix water included.
landingPricingItemTwoText: Desk + unlimited batch brew coffee pass for uninterrupted flow.
landingPricingItemThreeText: Dual 27" monitors, a reserved workstation, and unlimited coffee for days when you need a stable setup.
landingPricingItemFourText: A multifunctional event space for 30-60 people with AV, flexible layout options, and a self-service bar. An orientational hourly frame is shared on inquiry.
landingPrivateOfficeTitle: Privacy for you and your team
landingPrivateOfficeText: Your own office in Palmovka without utility or internet overhead. Private space, a unique access code, and unlimited coffee for the whole team.
landingPrivateOfficePerkThree: 5 meeting room hours per month included
landingMeetingRoomTitle: Meeting room for RPG and DnD evenings
landingMeetingRoomText: Looking for a calm space for a one-shot, campaign, or small community game night? Our meeting room also works as a cozy base for RPG and DnD groups that want to play uninterrupted and keep comfort and easy access close at hand.
landingMeetingRoomReservationFallbackBef: If the reservation flow is not working, email us at
landingMeetingRoomReservationFallbackAft: and we will arrange the booking manually.
landingMeetingRoomGalleryImageOneAlt: Current meeting room photo for RPG and DnD evenings
landingMeetingRoomGalleryImageTwoAlt: Another view of the meeting room prepared for play
landingUniversumLead: A place where work and play make sense in one continuous day.
landingUniversumParagraphOne: Deskohub is not just an address in Palmovka. It is a living ecosystem where work, creativity, and downtime can coexist.
landingUniversumParagraphTwo: Mornings are for focus and production with dependable infrastructure. In the evening, one door over, the space for board-game experiences and stories comes alive.
landingUniversumParagraphThree: We believe in a community that can work at full speed and have fun with the same intensity. That is why we connect modern automation with real human connection.
landingFaqItemOneAnswer: Choose the setup online -> receive your code -> tap at the door -> start working or playing.
landingFaqItemTwoAnswer: Two minutes from Palmovka metro, Prague 8.
landingFaqItemThreeAnswer: Step next door into Deskohub Bar for drinks and hundreds of board games.
landingFooterContactTitle: Need a booking, tour, or team setup?
landingFooterContactLead: Reach out and we will shape the right setup, from private offices and upcoming cowork offers to full-day events.
pricingMetadataDescription: Overview of Deskohub Workspace daily coworking passes and individual event-space pricing on request.
pricingDocumentIntro: Choose the tariff that matches how you want to use the space.
pricingDocumentCoworkingLead: Each tariff is valid for one person and is built around self-service access to a calm workspace.
pricingDocumentEventRentalLead: Rental pricing is prepared individually based on the specific request.
pricingDocumentEventRentalContact: Contact us for a price quote.
pricingTariffBasicDescription: Entry-level access to the shared coworking area for a focused working day.
pricingTariffBasicIncludeCowork: access to the shared coworking space
pricingTariffCoworkDescription: Extended daily access for days when you want refreshments covered without interrupting your flow.
pricingTariffProfiDescription: A daily setup for work that benefits from a stable station and extra equipment.
pricingTariffProfiIncludeEquipment: access to work equipment (for example, a monitor)
pricingImportantInfoFinalPrices: All prices are final. We are not a VAT payer.
pricingImportantInfoSinglePerson: Each pass is valid for one person.
pricingImportantInfoNoRefundAfterPin: After the access code (PIN) has been delivered, the booking cannot be cancelled or refunded.
pricingImportantInfoAvailability: The scope of services may vary based on current availability.
pricingEventPricingDescription: We quote event-space rental individually based on the event type, attendee count, duration, and required services.
contactMetadataTitle: Contact Deskohub Workspace | Reach out about cowork, events, and private rooms
contactMetadataDescription: Send a message to Deskohub Workspace about cowork passes, event rentals, private offices, or meeting room bookings in Palmovka.
contactHeroTitle: Tell us what kind of day you want to build.
contactHeroLead: Use the form below for cowork questions, event requests, private office inquiries, or anything that needs a human answer from the workspace team.
contactFormTitle: Send one clear brief. We will take it from there.
contactFormDescription: Minimal friction, no extra steps. Share the context, preferred timing, and anything your team needs from the space.
contactMessagePlaceholder: What do you need from Deskohub Workspace?
contactPrivacyNoteBefore: By sending this form, you confirm that you have read our
contactPrivacyNoteAfter: and agree that we may use your details to respond to your request.
reservationMetadataTitle: Reserve Deskohub Workspace | Day passes and workstations in Palmovka
reservationMetadataDescription: Reserve a Basic Day Pass, Cowork Plus pass, or Profi Workstation at Deskohub Workspace in Palmovka.
reservationHeroTitle: Reserve the setup your workday needs.
reservationHeroLead: Pick a pass, choose the date, and tell us who is arriving. We will confirm the reservation and prepare the right access flow.
reservationHeroPointOneText: Basic desk, coffee-powered day, or a workstation with monitors.
reservationHeroPointTwoText: A calm workspace two minutes from metro with self-service access.
reservationHeroPointThreeText: The request lands with the workspace team for final confirmation.
reservationFormTitle: Shape the day in one form.
reservationFormDescription: Choose the entry tier, date, coffee preference, and workstation setup. Required details stay minimal so the booking can move fast.
reservationTierBasicDescription: Open-space desk, high-speed Wi-Fi, and post-mix water. Coffee can be added if you want it.
reservationTierCoworkDescription: Desk plus unlimited batch brew coffee for uninterrupted flow.
reservationTierProfiDescription: Reserved workstation with monitor setup and courtesy coffee included.
reservationMonitor2x32Description: Larger dual monitors for extra canvas.
reservationMonitorQhd4kDescription: Sharper resolution setup for visual work.
reservationMessagePlaceholder: Arrival time, company name, invoice note, or anything we should know.
reservationLegalConsentLabel: I agree to the payment and workspace terms *
reservationLegalConsentBefore: By continuing to payment, I agree to the
reservationLegalConsentNoRefund: I also acknowledge that after the workspace PIN/access code is delivered, the order cannot be refunded.
reservationPrivacyNoteBefore: By sending this reservation form, you confirm that you have read our
reservationPrivacyNoteAfter: and understand that we use your details to process the reservation, send confirmation, and prevent abuse.
reservationSuccessMessage: Your reservation request has been sent. We will confirm the next step soon.
reservationErrorMessage: Checkout could not be started. Please check your details and try again.
reservationValidationLegalConsentRequire: Please accept the payment and legal terms before continuing.
checkoutOrderMetadataDescription: Choose a Deskohub Workspace pass and continue to secure payment.
checkoutPayMetadataTitle: Pay for workspace access | Deskohub Workspace
checkoutPayMetadataDescription: Review your Deskohub Workspace order, accept the terms, and continue to secure payment.
checkoutPaySubmitError: Payment could not be started. Please review the reservation details and try again.
checkoutPayPricingChangedLead: The order price changed since the payment link was prepared. Review the updated summary before continuing.
checkoutPayPricingChangedBanner: We refreshed the price from the current checkout rules. Continue with the updated amount only if it looks correct.
checkoutPayStateTooLarge: This order needs a shorter message before it can continue to payment. Please shorten the message and try again.
checkoutPaymentRetryMetadataDescription: Confirm the payment terms again and restart secure payment for your Deskohub Workspace reservation.
checkoutPaymentRetryLead: Your reservation details are preserved for this retry. Confirm the terms again immediately before starting a new secure payment session.
checkoutPaymentRetryConsentBefore: I confirm again that I agree to the
checkoutPaymentRetryError: Payment could not be restarted. Please review the reservation details and try again.
checkoutPaymentRetryCancelledBanner: The previous checkout was cancelled. You can start a fresh secure payment after confirming the terms again.
checkoutPaymentRetryFailedBanner: The previous payment did not complete. You can start a fresh secure payment after confirming the terms again.
checkoutStatusMetadataDescription: Check the current payment and fulfillment status for your Deskohub Workspace checkout.
checkoutStatusCreatedLead: We found the order, but the payment session has not reached the payment gateway yet. If you just started checkout, try opening the payment page again from the reservation flow.
checkoutStatusPendingLead: The local payment system has not received a final result yet. You can safely refresh this page later; access details are sent only after payment and fulfillment complete.
checkoutStatusPaidWaitingFulfillmentTitl: Payment is received. Access is being prepared.
checkoutStatusPaidWaitingFulfillmentLead: Your payment is marked as paid in our system. We are preparing the workspace access details and will email them after fulfillment completes.
checkoutStatusFulfilledLead: Payment and fulfillment are complete. The access details are sent by email, so check your inbox before arrival.
checkoutStatusFulfillmentFailedTitle: Payment is received, but access needs help.
checkoutStatusFulfillmentFailedLead: Payment is marked as paid, but automatic access preparation did not finish. We will review it and follow up by email.
checkoutStatusPaymentFailedLead: The payment system reports that the payment failed. No workspace access is issued for this order.
checkoutStatusCancelledLead: The payment system reports that this checkout was cancelled. No workspace access is issued for this order.
checkoutStatusExpiredLead: The payment window expired before a successful payment was confirmed. Start a new reservation if you still want to book a workspace day.
checkoutStatusNotFoundTitle: We could not find this checkout.
checkoutStatusNotFoundLead: This order ID is not available in the local checkout system. Check the link or start a new reservation.
checkoutStatusMissingSummary: No safe booking summary is available for this checkout link.
checkoutStatusEmailAccessNote: After successful payment fulfillment, workspace access details are sent by email. This page never shows access codes or personal contact data.
reservationEmailBusinessIntro: New coworking reservation from the Workspace website.
reservationEmailSendError: Failed to send your reservation. Please try again later.
reservationEmailCustomerBody: Thank you. We received your reservation and will follow up with confirmation or next steps.
reservationEmailCustomerFollowUp: If you want to add anything, reply or write to {email}.
contactEmailSendError: Failed to send your message. Please try again later.
contactEmailCustomerBody: Thanks for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible with next steps or an answer.
contactEmailCustomerFollowUp: If you want to add anything, reply or write to {email}.
checkoutEmailCustomerAccessBody: Payment is confirmed and your workspace reservation is prepared. Use this access code when you arrive.
checkoutEmailInternalPaidReservationBody: A paid Workspace checkout has completed enough fulfillment data for staff review.
cookieConsentConsentModalTitle: We use cookies for a reliable workspace site experience.
cookieConsentConsentModalDescription: Necessary cookies keep the site working. Optional cookies help us understand usage and remember preferences only if you allow them.
cookieConsentPreferencesUsageDescription: You can decide which optional cookie categories are allowed. Necessary cookies stay enabled because the site depends on them.
cookieConsentPreferencesNecessaryDescrip: These cookies support core website operation, locale handling, and storing your consent choice.
cookieConsentPreferencesAnalyticsDescrip: These cookies help us measure site usage, reservation-submission performance, and campaign effectiveness. Reservation analytics do not include form values or personal details.
cookieConsentPreferencesMarketingDescrip: These cookies would support advertising or remarketing tools if they are enabled in the future.
cookieConsentPreferencesPersonalizationD: These cookies remember optional display or interaction preferences when such features are available.
cookieSettingsDescription: Use this page to review or update which optional cookie categories you allow on the Deskohub Workspace site.
cookieSettingsNecessaryDescription: Required for basic functionality, locale routing, security, and storing consent choices.
cookieSettingsAnalyticsDescription: Help us evaluate site usage, reservation-submission performance, and campaign effectiveness without sending reservation form values or personal details.
cookieSettingsMarketingDescription: Would support advertising or campaign measurement tools if they are used later.
cookieSettingsPreferencesDescription: Remember optional presentation or interaction choices when those features exist.
contactSuccessMessage: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.
contactValidationReviewMessage: Please review the form and try again.
reservationValidationDatePast: Choose today or a future date.
reservationValidationMonitorRequired: Choose a monitor setup for Profi Workstation.
reservationValidationMonitorUnavailable: Monitor setup is available only with Profi Workstation.
reservationValidationCoffeeRequired: Coffee is included with this tier and must stay selected.
reservationRateLimitMessage: Too many reservation requests were sent. Please wait a moment and try again.
reservationSecurityInvalidOrigin: The reservation request could not be verified. Please reload the page and try again.
contactRateLimitMessage: Too many messages were sent from this connection. Please wait a moment and try again.
contactValidationNameMinimum: Name must be at least {min} characters.
contactValidationNameMaximum: Name can be at most {max} characters.
contactValidationEmailMaximum: Email can be at most {max} characters.
contactValidationPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid Czech phone number.
contactValidationPhoneMaximum: Phone can be at most {max} characters.
contactValidationMessageMinimum: Message must be at least {min} characters.
contactValidationMessageMaximum: Message can be at most {max} characters.
galleryEmptyNoPhotos: The Workspace gallery is waiting for Cloudinary photos tagged for this page.
galleryEmptyMissingMetadata: Cloudinary returned photos, but none included usable width and height metadata.
galleryErrorDescription: Photos could not be loaded from Cloudinary. Please try again later.
